name: Home Style Jerky
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients and marinate in the fridge for at least 8 hours, mixing occasionally.
2. Skewer the marinated strips on bamboo skewers (or toothpicks).
3. Place the skewered strips in the oven with a pan below to catch drippings.
4. Set the oven to its lowest setting (100-150°F) and keep the door slightly open.
5. The jerky should be dry after 8-10 hours.
